## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Backend: `ruff check .`, `mypy app`, and `pytest -q` all pass
- [ ] Frontend: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm run test -- --run`, `npm run build` all pass
- [ ] I added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] I updated docs where relevant (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or confidential data are included
- [ ] New dependencies are OSI-permissive (MIT / BSD / Apache-2.0 / ISC / MPL-2.0)
